---
title: "The history of a great many little boys and girls, for the amusement of all good children of four and five years of age"
---

## The history of a great many little boys and girls, for the amusement of all good children of four and five years of age

**Author:** Dorothy Kilner
**Date:** <i>c</i>. 1790
**Imprint:** London: Marshall

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
